title: baccharis trinervis var. trinervis
intro: Baccharis trinervis var. trinervis, also known as the "River Silver Burr" or "White Baccharis", is a shrub plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Baccharis trinervis var. trinervis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications such as salves and creams, allowing for various forms of herbal use.
